title: かくれんぼマイスター

text_block_list.text:
While on my way back home with Biwa Hayahide,
we're stopped by someone calling out to us.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey! Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Good timing! We were just looking for more
players. Come play hide-and-seek with us!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah! Play with us!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I must decline. I didn't come here to play. We just
happened to pass by on our way home.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Aw, come on! This is our last round, I promise!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: It'll be fun! Pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
The last kid who joined us hasn't had a chance to play at
all yet. Just think of this as your good deed for the day!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It's almost curfew... Oh, all right.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Trainer, is it all right if we—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Trainer, is it all right if we—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Thank you, and sorry for dragging you into this.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
By the way, Teio, which child hasn't had a chance
to play yet?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's—

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Me! I didn't play yet. Thank you for joining us!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well, aren't you polite? Now then, I have a
request for you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Would you like to hide with me? I have an idea I
want to try.

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: An idea?
And so, the game of hide-and-seek begins.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Hayahide and the other girl are the only
ones left.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I can't believe they outlasted me.

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
I know, right? That girl usually stinks at
hide-and-seek.

text_block_list.name: Girl B
text_block_list.text: And she always asks to play with us when it's too late. We'll have to invite her right away for our games if she's actually this good!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hmm...
Five minutes pass...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Found them!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! You got us!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Heheh! We wouldn't have been able to stay
hidden so long without you.

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
No! It's because of what you taught—oh! I gotta
keep that a secret!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you don't have to. It'll be more fun if you
tell everyone so they can try it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Just be sure to join everyone before it gets dark,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Okay!

Everyone goes home with big smiles on their
faces.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm glad she grasped the trick so quickly.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Now then, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Believe it or not, my sister and I were considered
the best hide-and-seekers around back in the
day.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: And I'll be happy to show you why!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Haha! Let's do this! Let's hide, everyone!
And so, the game of hide-and-seek begins.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: First place to check—under the slide!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Gah! You got me!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Next, the trees next to the bench!

text_block_list.name: Girl B
text_block_list.text: What? How'd you find me so quick?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: And now to find Teio...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: There you are, up in the tree behind my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Aw, c'mon! There's no way you could've known I
was here!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I merely factored in the size and number of kids
and playground equipment to narrow down my
choices. Well, did everybody have fun?

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

With a look of great satisfaction on her face,
Biwa Hayahide heads back to the dorms with
Tokai Teio.
